calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Dec-30-2003 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha/V.Mack, CSR: Deborah Neville
This matter heard Dec. 9, 2003 and is ordered off calendar.

AMENDED ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Dec-09-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha/V.Mack, CSR: Rhonda Fung.
There being no appearances, this matter is ordered off calendar.
Petitioner Corey Glenn Randle present in pro per, was sworn and examined.
The Court grants the petition for change of name to: Dignan Phoenix Banes.
Decree signed in open court.
